3211880.name: Neongarten Demo
3211880.description:
Congratulations! We have accepted your bid to redevelop Block #27343 inside Novo Stappelstad! This site is truly a blank slate. The former occupant, Yamaha Piano Research Division, was wiped out when an rogue wormhole escaped containment. Not a single building was left behind. You will have eight weeks to complete your contract. Make sure you hit your weekly milestones, or else you and your company will be terminated.

This demo features:

  • 15 different buildings

  • 2 unique islands

  • 7 research to complete

  • 6 objectives to complete the demo
